data.body: PROGRESS: gate fix (bug sue-skimp-tear) landed on main as change 320. Epic sure-foyer-aroma in_progress. Stacked Gerrit changes so far (on branch worktree-dso-code-review-16, base origin/main c83819a11): #325=f93a (eval arm+scorers+specs, commit 177a196, CLOSED+signed), #327=4b56 (base linter-deference + Pass-2 verifier discipline, commit 75be11683, CLOSED+signed). Both awaiting LLM-Review+Verified votes; will submit whole stack at end. REMAINING 12 stories: f983(->3c5d), 3c5d, da25, 7c58, 1669, da8a/0f8f(->1ead,3cb3,a010,d71f,f894). Per-story pipeline proven: review-plan PASS -> claim -> implement -> verify -> close(signed completion-verifier) -> stacked push.
